highlights.description: Principal-based identity model with CoreForge integration
Dashboard template marketplace with licensing and subscriptions
Multi-app deployment support via AppBackend adapter

added.description: Principal entity as unified identity root for all actor types (human, application, agent, service)
Human schema for human-specific identity attributes
PrincipalMembership for organization memberships
Publisher entity for organizations creating and selling templates
Listing entity for marketplace entries
License entity for purchased access to marketplace items
Subscription entity for recurring license subscriptions
SeatAssignment entity for per-seat license allocation
DashboardTemplate entity for reusable dashboard templates
Publisher and consumer role hierarchies for authorization
Marketplace-specific permissions (publish, purchase, review)
SpiceDB integration for fine-grained access control
Multi-app backend adapter implementing cfmultiapp.AppBackend interface
Schema-isolated database connections for multi-app deployment

changed.description: Migrate JWT implementation to CoreForge session/jwt package
Migrate OAuth providers to CoreForge identity/oauthclient package
Replace custom ChartIR types with @grokify/echartify re-exports

fixed.description: Resolve golangci-lint issues including gofmt formatting

documentation.description: Authorization user guide for role-based access control
License types and seat management documentation
Update mkdocs navigation with marketplace and authorization sections
Update README with marketplace feature highlights
Update MkDocs to PlexusOne unified theme with dark mode default
Update documentation URLs to plexusone organization
Add UTF-8 icons to README Features section

internal.description: Add shared CI/CD pipelines via reusable workflows
Remove local replace directives for coreforge and omniobserve
Commit builder/dist for go:embed (enables `go install` without Node.js)
Add builder/dist to CI paths filter for all workflows

highlights.description: Full-stack dashboard builder with Go backend and TypeScript frontend
Ent-based database schema with OAuth authentication
Data source integrations and alert system

added.description: Go server with Chi router and middleware stack
JWT authentication with access and refresh tokens
OAuth integration for GitHub and Google providers
User entity with email, password hash, and role fields
Organization entity for multi-tenant support
OAuthAccount entity for external provider credentials
RefreshToken entity for token management
Dashboard entity with JSON layout storage
SavedQuery entity for reusable queries
DashboardVersion entity for version history
Alert and AlertChannel entities for alerting system
AlertEvent entity for alert history tracking
DataSource entity for external data connections
Integration entity for third-party service connections
TypeScript ChartIR types based on echartify specification
TypeScript dashboard and widget type definitions

documentation.description: README with feature summary and installation instructions

internal.description: Initial project setup with go.mod and directory structure
